allowed_files.server/internal/cli/reset_admin.go: Admin reset command clears a fixed set of authentication tables.
allowed_files.server/internal/integrations/bilibili/so: Bilibili source status repository writes source runtime state.
Bilibili source state repository owns room and dynamic state queries.
allowed_files.server/internal/logging/repository/repos: Management log repository writes structured log rows.
Management log repository reads paged cursor state.
Management log repository builds filtered log-list queries.
Management log repository loads detail rows and prunes old rows.
Management log repository builds cursor-window queries.
allowed_files.server/internal/permission/blacklist.go: Permission repository owns blacklist read and write queries.
allowed_files.server/internal/permission/whitelist.go: Permission repository owns whitelist read and write queries.
allowed_files.server/internal/plugins/configstore/repo: Plugin config store builds scoped read queries with optional filters.
allowed_files.server/internal/plugins/kvstore/reposito: Plugin KV store builds scoped list queries with pagination.
allowed_files.server/internal/render/repository/reposi: Render template repository loads template state and existence checks.
Render template repository updates plugin-owned template state.
Render template repository lists template state.
Render template repository owns local upsert and delete statements.
Render template repository synchronizes desired template state in a transaction.
Render template repository validates source-package ownership.
Render template repository lists version snapshots.
allowed_files.server/internal/secrets/secrets.go: Secret store repository owns secret_store CRUD.
allowed_files.server/internal/storage/integrity.go: Storage integrity check uses SQLite PRAGMA quick_check.
allowed_files.server/internal/storage/snapshot.go: Storage snapshot uses SQLite PRAGMA and VACUUM INTO.
Storage lifecycle runs WAL checkpoint maintenance.
allowed_files.server/internal/storage/store_open.go: Storage open configures SQLite PRAGMA settings.
allowed_files.server/internal/storage/store_schema.go: Storage migration runner applies migration files and records schema_migrations.
allowed_files.server/internal/integrations/thirdparty/: Third-party account repository owns account list queries.
Third-party account repository updates account secret references.
Third-party account repository owns account write queries.
